title: Welcome to Flashbacks and Sentence Power!

questions.question: What does "flashback" mean?
options: A sentence made from two or more simple ideas joined together.
A part of a sentence that has a subject and a verb and forms a complete thought or part of one.
A sentence with one main idea.
A part of a story that takes you back to an earlier time.
questions.correct_answer: A part of a story that takes you back to an earlier time.
questions.explanation: "flashback" means: A part of a story that takes you back to an earlier time.

questions.question: What does "simple sentence" mean?
options: A part of a story that takes you back to an earlier time.
A part of a sentence that has a subject and a verb and forms a complete thought or part of one.
A sentence made from two or more simple ideas joined together.
A sentence with one main idea.
questions.correct_answer: A sentence with one main idea.
questions.explanation: "simple sentence" means: A sentence with one main idea.

questions.question: Fill in the blank: Flashbacks are parts of a ______ that show past events.
questions.explanation: The full sentence is: "Flashbacks are parts of a story that show past events."

questions.question: Which of the following is TRUE about this topic?
options: Compound sentences combine two or more main ideas (clauses) using words like 'and', 'but', 'or', 'so', 'since'.
Simple sentences have one main idea (clause).
Flashbacks are parts of a story that show past events.
Writers choose different sentence types for dramatic effect, description, or to show multiple actions.
questions.correct_answer: Simple sentences have one main idea (clause).
questions.explanation: Correct! "Simple sentences have one main idea (clause)." is one of the key things to remember.

questions.question: What does "compound sentence" mean?
options: A sentence with one main idea.
A sentence made from two or more simple ideas joined together.
A part of a sentence that has a subject and a verb and forms a complete thought or part of one.
A part of a story that takes you back to an earlier time.
questions.correct_answer: A sentence made from two or more simple ideas joined together.
questions.explanation: "compound sentence" means: A sentence made from two or more simple ideas joined together.
